items.label: Learning
items.detail: Refining a personal AI-agent workflow system, including a reusable /concept-init slash command and a planning-depth framework to avoid over-documenting before building.

items.label: Building
items.detail: Building lejxz.dev with Next.js, Framer Motion, and Tailwind CSS — content-as-JSON with a hidden local dashboard for editing.

items.label: Refining
items.detail: Iterating on Hira, a persona-aware Filipino labor-matching platform for HCI coursework, and adapting its research paper into competition proposals.

items.label: Exploring
items.detail: Digging into vision-language model integration, sign language recognition, and AI systems that perceive the real world through a camera.
